reviews.comment:
Siempre cola para cargar.  Parece una atracción del pueblo ya esto de tener que perder tiempo para cargar.  No le ponen voluntad para hacerlo rápido. Una pena

Always a queue to charge. It's become a local attraction, having to waste time charging. They don't seem to care about speeding things up. It's a shame.

reviews.comment:
Demasiado tiempo de espera. Una hora para una fila de 6 automóviles, no se entiende en qué utilizan el tiempo.
Hace falta una estación de servicio en la entrada a la localidad, sobre la ruta, para los que están de paso.

(Translated by Google)
The wait is far too long. An hour for a line of six cars—it's baffling how they use their time. A gas station is needed at the entrance to the town, on the main road, for those passing through.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1037497486456345522/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURXN1lHaWlBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Nunca le anda la aplicacion y la full no t cobra con el codigo qr. Y si lo hacen tebes q eaoerar mucho. Uno se cansa y paga en efectivo. Muy mala atencion

(Translated by Google)
The app never works, and the full plan doesn't accept QR code payments. And if they do, you have to wait a long time. You get fed up and end up paying in cash. Very bad service.

reviews.comment:
Todos los años paso por ahí y me atiende de 10 sobre todo en playa. Este año pase y la verdad q el full me desepciono, no había otro cliente más q yo pero la cajera estaba hablando con otra compañera y ni buen día ni me preguntó si pagaba con la app ni me preguntó si quería los puntos serviclub  ni bolsa para mí compra ni nada.

(Translated by Google)
Every year I go there, and they serve me excellently, especially at the beach. This year I went, and honestly, I was completely disappointed. There was no one else there but me, but the cashier was talking to another colleague and, on cue, she didn't even ask me if I was paying with the app, or if I wanted Serviclub points, or a bag for my groceries, or anything.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1037497486456345522/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURJOF9XdGxRRRAB
